layout.playLocalFolderHint: Large folders may be heavy on weak CPUs/RAM.
layout.playLocalFolderWarning: Opening a large local folder can use a lot of CPU and RAM while scanning files and reading metadata. On weak devices, choose a smaller folder or disable heavy Audio Studio effects if playback crackles. Continue?
layout.backupConfigDesc: This will overwrite your existing backup on Google Drive with your current local settings. Do you want to continue?
layout.restoreConfigDesc: This will overwrite your current local settings with the backup from Google Drive. Do you want to continue?
layout.backupFail: Failed to backup to Google Drive. Ensure you have linked your account.
layout.restoreSuccess: Restore successful! The app will now reload to apply changes.
layout.restoreFail: Failed to restore from Google Drive. No backup found or account not linked.

studio.warningDesc: Heavy effects can overload weak CPUs and make playback stutter or crackle, even after pre-calculation if the device cannot keep the audio buffer filled.
studio.warningRecommendWeak: Recommended for weak devices: enable pre-calculation, keep the limiter on, turn off high quality oversampling, and reduce reverb/stereo widening or very large EQ presets.

masterOutput.title: Master Output
masterOutput.desc: Final stage output controls and panning.
masterOutput.loudnessDesc: Smooths volume differences with a gentle end-of-chain compressor and makeup gain.
masterOutput.hqOversampleDesc: Reduces aliasing in the limiter's soft clip stage. Warning: May cause lag on mobile devices.
masterOutput.precalcIdleDesc: Recommended for weak CPUs when enough RAM is available: pre-renders the full Audio Studio chain and plays from a processed buffer. Warning: Uses a lot of RAM and may crash on low-memory devices. EQ/Effects changes will only apply to the next track.
masterOutput.queuePrecalcDesc: Uses all {{cores}} CPU cores the browser exposes and keeps rendered buffers in RAM until audio settings change.
masterOutput.queuePrecalcWarning: You are about to make the browser pre-render the entire {{count}}-track queue using every CPU core it reports ({{cores}} cores). If your machine is strong, hit OK and prove it. If not, expect heat, lag, RAM pressure, or a crashed tab. Continue?

eq.title: Equalizer
eq.noteDesc: Switch to Advanced (10-Band) or Custom tab to freely adjust frequency sliders.
eq.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete preset '{name}'?

tone.title: Preamp & Tone
tone.desc: Global gain adjustments and bass/treble tuning.

dynamics.title: Compressor
dynamics.limiterDesc: Limits output peaks before the speakers, reducing crackling when EQ, preamp, or effects raise the level. Recommended to leave on.

spatial.reverbDesc: Add space and depth using Convolution Reverb.
spatial.stereoDesc: Widen your stereo image using Mid/Side processing. 100% is normal, >100% is wider.

playlist.libraryEmpty: Your library of playlists is empty.
playlist.clickSearch: Click the button to search your library and add tracks.
playlist.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?

nowPlaying.noTrackDesc: Go to Playlist or Library to play a track
nowPlaying.cycleQueues: When the last queue ends, switch to the first queue and vice versa
